gt_provenance.details: recovery scored against true canonicalized held-out corpus texts (eval_texts), not model outputs

score_normalization.details: no metric divided by model's own output stats; standard token-F1/exact/posAcc/cosine

result_existence.details: vs_i_g=0.48155, vs_release_cos=0.97203, vs_neg_distortion=0.95105 present exactly; 13 records = 1 plaintext + 4 budgets x 3 shapes; run.log shows all 13 inversions

probe_not_attack.details: spectral_channel_mi_diag(cov, noise_var) geometry-only; imports numpy/torch, never Vec2Text/recovery/score files

matched_budget.details: iso/sgt_opt/tail_dump all bisect to target I_G; auditor independently parsed JSON: matched-budget I_G ranges <= 2.3e-13 bits; shape spread is real divergence, not unequal-budget fabrication

scope.details: explicitly 1 surface (pooled GTR), 1 attack (pretrained gtr-base corrector), eval_n=96, max_tokens=32, num_steps=20, beam=1
